'''Mota''' was a member of the [[Workers]] class who lived on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[New Apsolon/Legends|New Apsolon]]. He sold weapons illegally, while the leader of the Workers, [[Lenz]] preferred obtaining their weapons legally. However, in one case, Lenz told [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Qui-Gon Jinn/Legends|Qui-Gon Jinn]] and his [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]] [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] that Mota could help them find a [[Probe droid/Legends|probe droid]], information about [[Balog (Human)|Balog]] and two [[Speeder/Legends|speeders]].
